description_long: This is a classic regulatory stop sign featuring an octagonal red face with a white border and the word 'PARE' in bold, uppercase white letters, indicating the Portuguese or Spanish word for 'STOP'. The sign is mounted on a vertical, cylindrical gray pole, typical of street signage. The red surface of the sign is likely reflective to enhance visibility at night or in low-light conditions. The back of the sign is plain, showing the reverse of the text and the mounting hardware. The pole appears to be made of metal, providing durability and resistance to weather. The overall construction is robust, designed to withstand outdoor urban environments and provide clear traffic instructions.
description: An octagonal red stop sign with 'PARE' in white uppercase letters, mounted on a gray metal pole. The sign is reflective and built for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: A side view showing the thin profile of the sign and pole, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_1: The front view displays the red octagonal sign with 'PARE' in bold white letters and a white border, mounted on a gray pole.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 0, showing the slim edge of the sign and pole.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the back of the sign, with the reversed 'PARE' text faintly visible and the mounting hardware attached to the pole.
